data.title: NZ Super Fund Lifts Stake in Sky Network Television to 8.65%
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SKY Network Television ( (SYKWF) ) has shared an announcement.

The New Zealand Superannuation Fund, through New Zealand Superannuation Fund Nominees Limited, has increased its substantial shareholding in Sky Network Television to 11,906,769 ordinary shares, representing 8.648% of the company’s issued voting capital, up from 7.373% at its last disclosure in July 2025. The change results from net on-market purchases between July 2025 and 20 January 2026, during which the fund bought 2,090,586 shares and sold 334,342 shares, signalling a strengthened institutional position in Sky Network Television and potentially reflecting increased confidence in the broadcaster’s outlook and strategic direction.

More about SKY Network Television

Sky Network Television is a New Zealand-based pay-television and broadcasting company that provides subscription TV services, streaming platforms and related media content to domestic audiences. It operates in the media and entertainment sector, focusing on delivering sports, movies, and general entertainment channels to households and businesses across New Zealand.

For an in-depth examination of SYKWF stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Pryme Raises NOK 6 Million in Subsequent Share Offering
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pryme B.V. ( (DE:8XG0) ) has provided an announcement.

Pryme N.V. has completed its subsequent offering of new shares, receiving subscriptions for 1,522,998 shares and allocating 1,500,708 shares at NOK 4.00 each, raising gross proceeds of NOK 6.0 million (around EUR 518,000). The capital increase tied to the offering is expected to be registered in late January, with delivery of the new shares to investors’ VPS accounts shortly thereafter, providing the Rotterdam‑based plastics recycler with fresh funding to support its operations and growth plans, while DNB Bank ASA acted as settlement and receiving agent and Advokatfirmaet Schjødt AS served as legal adviser.

More about Pryme B.V.

Pryme N.V. is a cleantech company that converts plastic waste into pyrolysis oil through large-scale chemical recycling, using proprietary enhancements to a proven process. The company has begun production at its first plant in the port of Rotterdam, designed to handle about 26,000 tonnes of plastic waste annually, and aims to build a portfolio of owned and operated plants with strategic partners to support a low‑carbon circular plastics economy; its shares are listed on Euronext Growth Oslo.

Average Trading Volume: 4,378

Current Market Cap: NOK188.2M

data.title: Sotherly Hotels Shareholders Approve Buyout and Go-Private Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sotherly Hotels ( (SOHO) ) has issued an update.

On January 22, 2026, Sotherly Hotels Inc. shareholders approved the merger of the company with an acquisition vehicle of KW Kingfisher LLC, a joint venture led by affiliates of Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners LP with Ascendant Capital Partners LP as strategic partner, in a special meeting where approximately 58.7% of outstanding shares were represented, and also endorsed on an advisory basis the compensation arrangements for named executive officers tied to the deal. The transaction, which remains subject to closing conditions and is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, will see the joint venture acquire all outstanding Sotherly common shares for $2.25 per share in cash, positioning the lodging REIT for a transition to private ownership and delivering a defined cash exit for its stockholders while potentially altering its future capital structure and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (SOHO) stock is a Hold with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sotherly Hotels stock, see the SOHO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SOHO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SOHO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (TTM revenue softness, slight net loss, and leverage-related risk) and negative corporate events (default notice and preferred dividend deferrals). Technicals are moderately supportive with improving longer-term trend and neutral-to-positive momentum, but valuation remains challenged due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield support.

To see Spark’s full report on SOHO stock, click here.

More about Sotherly Hotels

Sotherly Hotels Inc. (Nasdaq: SOHO) is a self-managed, self-administered lodging real estate investment trust focused on owning, acquiring, renovating and repositioning full-service, primarily upscale and upper-upscale hotel properties in primary markets across the mid-Atlantic and southern United States. The company’s portfolio comprises ten full-service hotels in seven states totaling 2,786 rooms, along with interests in two condominium hotels and their associated rental programs.

Average Trading Volume: 359,201

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $44.53M

Gold Digger Resources Inc ( (TSE:NUKV) ) has issued an update.

Nuclear Vision Limited has upsized its previously announced private placement to as much as 24 million units at $0.25 per unit, increasing the potential gross proceeds to $6 million in response to strong investor demand. Each unit comprises one common share and a half warrant, with the warrants exercisable at tiered prices over 24 months, and the company plans to deploy the net proceeds primarily to advance its Svabovce and Michalova manganese projects in Slovakia and for general working capital, a move that strengthens its funding base for critical mineral development within its broader energy transition strategy.

On January 22, 2026, Westamerica Bancorporation’s board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.46 per share on common stock, payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 2, 2026, underscoring the bank’s consistent dividend policy. The move followed the company’s January 15, 2026 report of $27.8 million in net income, or $1.12 diluted earnings per share, for the fourth quarter of 2025, with management citing reliable earnings, financial strength and a conservative risk profile, signaling ongoing stability for investors and reinforcing its positioning as a financially solid regional banking franchise.

data.title: Heritage Financial Posts Strong Quarter and Prepares Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Heritage Financial ( (HFWA) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 22, 2026, Heritage Financial reported significantly stronger fourth-quarter 2025 and full-year results, with quarterly net income rising to $22.2 million from $19.2 million in the prior quarter and $11.9 million a year earlier, and diluted earnings per share increasing to $0.65. The bank delivered higher profitability metrics, including a return on average assets of 1.27%, improved net interest income and margin, deposit growth of $62.7 million, and a lower cost of deposits, while also declaring a regular cash dividend earlier in January. Management highlighted robust year-over-year earnings growth, improved efficiency, and incremental strengthening of its balance sheet, positioning the company for further scale as it moves toward closing its approved acquisition of Olympic Bancorp at the end of January, a deal expected to enhance its competitive standing and broaden its regional presence.

The most recent analyst rating on (HFWA) stock is a Buy with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Heritage Financial stock, see the HFWA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HFWA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HFWA is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong cash generation and low leverage) and a supportive earnings outlook (improving net interest margin and earnings). Technicals add a positive trend backdrop, while valuation is reasonable with a healthy dividend. Key constraints are softer profitability metrics (lower ROE), operating cash flow conversion signals, and credit/expense pressures amid merger execution.

To see Spark’s full report on HFWA stock, click here.

More about Heritage Financial

Heritage Financial Corporation, based in Olympia, Washington, is the parent of Heritage Bank and operates as a regional banking franchise focused on traditional community banking services, including loans, deposits and related financial products, with a growing footprint that will be expanded further through the pending acquisition of Olympic Bancorp and its subsidiary, Kitsap Bank.

Average Trading Volume: 207,103

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

The latest update is out from Mullen Group ( (TSE:MTL) ).

Mullen Group Ltd. has declared a monthly dividend of $0.07 per common share, payable on February 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 31, 2026. The dividend, designated as an eligible dividend for Canadian tax purposes, underscores the company’s ongoing commitment to returning capital to shareholders and may be viewed as a sign of confidence in the stability of its operations across its broad North American transportation and logistics portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MTL) stock is a Hold with a C$18.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mullen Group stock, see the TSE:MTL Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:MTL stock, click here.

More about Mullen Group

Mullen Group Ltd. is a publicly traded Canadian company focused on transportation and logistics, with one of the largest portfolios of logistics businesses in North America. Through a network of independently operated companies, it provides services such as less-than-truckload and truckload transport, warehousing, distribution, customs brokerage, third-party logistics, transload, oversized and specialized hauling, as well as specialized services to the energy, mining, forestry and construction sectors in Western Canada, including water management, fluid hauling and environmental reclamation. The corporate office supplies capital, financial expertise, legal and technology support, shared services and strategic planning to its operating units, and its shares trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol MTL.

data.title: Strive Inc Launches Upsized Preferred Offering and Exchanges
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Strive Inc ( (ASST) ) has issued an update.

On January 22, 2026, Strive, Inc. entered into an underwriting agreement with Barclays Capital and Cantor Fitzgerald for an upsized underwritten follow-on offering of 1,320,000 shares of its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Preferred SATA Stock at $90 per share, expected to close on January 27, 2026 and generate gross proceeds of about $118.8 million. Strive plans to use the net proceeds, along with cash on hand and potential proceeds from unwinding capped call transactions, primarily to redeem or repurchase a portion of Semler Scientific’s 4.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 and its borrowings under a Coinbase Credit master loan, to advance its shift back to a perpetual-preferred-only amplification model, as well as to acquire bitcoin and bitcoin-related products and for working capital and general corporate purposes. Also on January 22, 2026, Strive announced that it expects to enter privately negotiated exchange agreements with holders of $90 million aggregate principal amount of the Semler Convertible Notes, to be swapped for approximately 930,000 newly issued shares of SATA Stock, a move that, together with the cash offering, could retire debt, deepen the company’s reliance on its high-yield preferred equity structure, and further entrench its bitcoin-centric treasury strategy, although the exchanges remain subject to binding documentation and customary closing conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (ASST) stock is a Hold with a $0.87 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Strive Inc stock, see the ASST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ASST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASST is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (severe losses and significant cash burn) and bearish technical positioning (below major moving averages). Positive corporate events provide some offset, while valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no provided dividend yield for the common stock.

To see Spark’s full report on ASST stock, click here.

More about Strive Inc

Strive, Inc. (Nasdaq: SATA) is a financial company that has adopted a bitcoin-focused treasury strategy and capital structure centered on its Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Preferred Stock, known as SATA Stock. Through its wholly owned subsidiary Semler Scientific, the company has previously issued convertible senior notes and maintains borrowings under a master loan agreement, and it is now repositioning its balance sheet toward a perpetual-preferred-only amplification model with exposure to bitcoin and bitcoin-related products.

Average Trading Volume: 129,014,539

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $794.3M

For a thorough assessment of ASST stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: HIAG flags profit jump of more than 50% for 2025 on asset sales and revaluations
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from HIAG Immobilien Holding AG ( (CH:HIAG) ).

HIAG Immobilien Holding AG anticipates a substantial earnings surge for the 2025 financial year, projecting consolidated net profit to come in 50% to 55% above the CHF 75.2 million reported for 2024, significantly beating both last year’s result and market expectations. The company attributes this profit jump mainly to extraordinary gains from disposals of non‑strategic properties, which contributed around CHF 18 million before taxes, sizeable positive revaluation effects of roughly CHF 50 million on its development pipeline, and stronger‑than‑expected demand for its “Livingstone” condominium project in Cham, where a higher notarization rate of 56% by year‑end 2025 translated into an additional contribution of about CHF 25 million before taxes; detailed annual figures are scheduled for release on 3 March 2026.

More about HIAG Immobilien Holding AG

HIAG Immobilien Holding AG is a leading, SIX Swiss Exchange‑listed Swiss real estate company with a portfolio of around CHF 2.0 billion. Its integrated business model covers the full real estate value chain, including portfolio and asset management, site development and transaction management, with investments in residential, commercial and industrial properties in economically strong regions of Switzerland to secure stable rental income, capital recycling potential and a growing dividend base.

Average Trading Volume: 7,321

Current Market Cap: CHF1.19B

See more insights into HIAG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
